description: You are logged into the wger fitness manager at http://localhost as the admin user (username: admin, password: adminadmin). In the 'Hypertrophy Block' routine on the 'Legs' training day, configure the set types for the existing exercises to track training volume accurately. For the 'Barbell Squat', set the first two sets to 'Warm-up' and the remaining three to 'Normal'. For the 'Leg Extension', set the fourth (final) set to 'Drop set' and the first three to 'Normal'. Do not add or delete any sets.
